insights.text: iOS 17.5 OTP crash preventing user login during peak hours, causing a 45% spike in complaints.
Users reporting misleading promotional links and vouchers that expire too quickly or are invalid.
Frequent screen freeze and lag on older devices since the summer redesign update.

PO: Prioritize the iOS 17.5 OTP crash hotfix in the current sprint.
Redesign promo voucher transparency to prevent misleading terms.
QA: Construct test cases with poor connections simulating OTP receipt delays.
Run memory profile tests on older iOS/Android devices during payment processes.
Marketing: Issue a public statement advising iOS users to update to the latest hotfix.
Launch an explicit 'How to Use Vouchers' micro-campaign to reset expectations.

reviews.text: App crashes immediately after iOS 17.5 update during standard OTP login check. Ruined my payment flow!
Love the transfer ease, but please add a true dark mode. The current gray background is very blinding.
Charges hidden transfer fees without warning. I thought it was free, but suddenly got charged 2,000 VND.
Fast payments and friendly support. Best e-wallet in Vietnam so far.
MoMo runs extremely slowly on my Galaxy S10. Please optimize performance.

insights.text: Occasional double charges when scanning QR codes on unstable 3G/4G networks.
Clean interface but font scaling in older Android screens cuts off Vietnamese accents.
High volume of feedback requesting easier Zalo chat integration for group splitting payments.

PO: Implement a QR-code double-payment debouncer on checkout endpoints.
Refine layout design to handle system-level dynamic font scaling cleanly.
QA: Simulate patchy network quality (3G drops) during payment submission.
Test text layout bounds across multiple device viewport and font size variations.
Marketing: Highlight 'Smooth Group Bill Splitting' features directly inside the Zalo chat ecosystem.

reviews.text: I checked out twice because the first time it loaded forever. Ended up being double charged!
The UI is very elegant, integration with Zalo makes paying so easy. Highly recommend.
Voucher was promised but didn't apply automatically at checkout. Hard to understand terms.

insights.text: Users express frustration over registration promos being limited to first-time banking customers only.
Light white-gray theme is blinding when scanning QR codes in dim restaurants/cabs; users request dark mode.

PO: Design a dedicated Dark Mode for QR-scanning screen states or enable automatically if ambient light is low.
Broaden promo campaigns to reward loyal long-time users rather than only new registrants.
QA: Verify QR scanning success rates under extremely low light levels.
Marketing: Position the wallet as 'Ultimate Bank Partner' promoting QR code scan-and-pay anywhere.

reviews.text: Scanning QR in a dark taxi at night is impossible. The white flash/UI is blindly bright, please add dark mode!
Incredible payment speed. Directly integrated into my Vietcombank app, so no second wallet required.
